body.head: Iḷampūraṇar
body.p: ed. Namaccivāya Mutaliyār 1931, 62.

p.note: This verse and the next are considered one verse.

body.head: Cēṉāvaraiyar
body.p: ed. Ci. Vai. Tamōtarampiḷḷai 1868, 81–82.

i - ḷ. atuveṉap peyar koṭuttōtappaṭṭa vēṟṟumaiccol āṟāvatām. atu uṭaiyatāy niṟkuntaṉṉāṉum piṟitoṉṟāṉum itaṉatituveṉpatu paṭa niṟkumataṉāṟ kiḷaviyiṟṟōṉ ṟuṅkiḻamaiyaip poruḷākavuṭaittu. e-ṟu. eṉavē, āṟāvatu kiḻamaipporuṭṭeṉṟum, akkiḻamai taṉṉāṉ vanta taṟkiḻamaiyum piṟitāṉ vanta piṟitiṉkiḻamaiyumeṉa iraṇṭeṉṟuṅ kūṟiyavāṟām.
taṉṉeṉṟatu taṉṉōṭoṟṟumaiyuṭaiya poruḷai. piṟiteṉṟatu taṉṉiṉ vēṟākiya poruḷai.

aḵtēl, taṉṉiṉum piṟitiṉumākiya kiḻamaitteṉṉātu itaṉatituveṉu maṉṉakiḷavikkiḻamaitteṉṟateṉṉaiyeṉiṉ:- poruṭkiḻamaiyum, paṇpukkiḻamaiyum, toḻiṟkiḻamaiyum avaipōlavaṉavumeṉak kiḻamaitām pala, avaṟṟuḷoṉṟu cuṭṭātu itaṉatutiveṉṉuñcollāṟṟōṉṟuṅ kiḻamaimāttiram cuṭṭumeṉṟaṟku itaṉatitu veṉumaṉṉakiḷavikkiḻamaitteṉṟār.
itaṉavivaiyeṉṉum paṉmaiyuruputtoṭarumaṭaṅkutaṟku aṉṉakiḷaviyeṉṟār.
oṉṟu pala kuḻīiya taṟkiḻamaiyum, vēṟu pala kuḻīiya taṟkiḻamaiyum, oṉṟiyaṟkiḻamaiyum, uṟuppiṉkiḻamaiyum, meytirintāya taṟkiḻamaiyumeṉat taṟkiḻamai aintuvakaippaṭum.
poruḷiṉkiḻamaiyum, nilattiṉkiḻamaiyum, kālattiṉkiḻamaiyumeṉap piṟitiṉkiḻamai mūvakaippaṭum. avaṟṟiṟkutāraṇam muṉṉark kāṭṭutum. (18)

body.head: Nacciṉārkkiṉiyar
body.p: ed. Irāma. Kōvintacāmipiḷḷai 1997, 96–98.
itu, muṟaiyāṉē āṟāvatip poruṭkaṇ varumeṉkiṉṟatu.

(i-ḷ) atu veṉap peyariya vēṟṟumaik kiḷavi yāṟākuvatē ― mēlatu veṉap peyarkoṭut tōtappaṭṭa vēṟṟumaic col lāṟā kuvatām, atu ― avvēṟṟumaic col, taṉṉiṉum ― oru poruḷiṉatuṭaimaip poruḷāy niṟkun taṉṉō ṭoṟṟumai yuṭaiya poruḷāṉum, piṟitiṉum ― oruporuliṉa tuṭaimaip poruḷāy niṟkun taṉṉiṉ vēṟākiya poruḷāṉum, ‘itaṉa titu’ veṉum – ipporuḷiṉuṭaiya tipporuḷeṉpatu paṭa niṟkum. aṉṉa kiḷavik kiḻamaittu - aṉṉa poruḷāṟ ṟōṉṟuṅ kiḻamaiyaip poruḷāka vuṭaittueṉṟavāṟu.
īṇṭut taṉ ṉeṉṟa turu pēṟkum poruḷai.aṉṉa veṉṟā ritaṉa vivai yeṉṉum paṉmai yuṟupu, māteṉṉu morumai yurupu maṭaṅkutaṟku.
(u-m)
eṉavarum.
oṉṟu pala kuḻīiyatum, vēṟupala kuḻīi yatum, oṉṟiyaṟ kiḻamaiyu, muṟuppiṉ kiḻamaiyum meytirintāyatu meṉat taṟkiḻamai yaintu vakaippaṭum.
‘aimpāl urimaiyum ataṉtaṟ kiḻamai’ yeṉpatakat tiyamātaliṉ
poruḷiṉ kiḻamaiyum, nilattiṉ kiḻamaiyuṅ kālattiṉ kiḻamaiyu meṉap piṟitiṉ kiḻamai mūvakappaṭum. (18)

body.head: Teyvaccilaiyār
body.p: āṟām vēṟṟumai yāmāṟu uṇarttutal nutaliṟṟu.
i-ḷ:― āṟām vēṟṟumaiyāvatu atuveṉap peyar peṟṟa vēṟṟumaiccol. atu taṉṉiṉāṉum piṟitiṉāṉum itaṉatu itu eṉa varum peṟṟippaṭṭa poruṭ kiḻamaiyai yuṭaittu. e-ṟu.

taṉ eṉṟatu uṭaiyāṉai. piṟiteṉṟatu uṭaipporuḷai. īṇṭuk kiḷavi eṉpatu poruḷ. kiḷakkappaṭuvatu kiḷaviyāyiṟṟu. kiḻamai eṉpatu urimai. taṉṉoṭum poruḷōṭum uḷḷa urimaiyuṇaravarum āṟāvateṉṟavāṟu. atu veṉpatu orumai yuṇarttum collākaliṉ, vantatu koṇṭu vārātatu muṭittal eṉpataṉāl, paṉmaiyuṇarttum akara urupuṅ koḷka. u-m:―
ulakattukkuḻaiyuṭaiyārum palar. kuḻaiyum pala. āyiṉum, ikkuḻai ivaṉateṉṉum urimai tōṉṟa vantavāṟu kaṇṭukoḷka. [17]

body.head: Kallāṭaṉār
body.p: ed. Cuntaramūrtti 1964, 75.

p.note: itaṉaiyum aṭutta nūṟpāvaiyum iṇaittu orē nūṟpāvākak koḷvar iḷampūraṇar.
